compressed_prompt: write lowercase letter asking friend to vote
response:
Subject: a quick favor  

hey [friend's name],  

hope you’re doing well! i wanted to reach out about the upcoming election. voting is such a simple but powerful way to make our voices heard, and i hope you’re planning to cast your ballot.  

if you need any info on how or where to vote, i’m happy to help. every vote really does count, and it’s so important to have a say in what happens in our community.  

thanks for considering it—and let me know if you have any questions!  

take care,  
[your name]
